name: FARMERS & MERCHANTS BANCORP INC
summary: Farmers & Merchants Bancorp, Inc. is an Ohio-incorporated bank holding company operating primarily through The Farmers & Merchants State Bank, a community bank serving Northwest Ohio, Northeast Indiana, and Southeast Michigan since 1897. The Bank offers commercial, agricultural, and residential mortgage lending, consumer loans, checking and savings accounts, CDs, IRAs, HSAs, online banking, ACH services, remote deposit capture, investment services via FM Investment Services (Raymond James), and insurance products through F&M Insurance Agency, LLC.

products.name: Commercial & Industrial Loans
products.description: Operating lines of credit and machinery purchase financing for business customers.

products.name: Agricultural Loans
products.description: Loans for farmland, farm equipment, livestock, and operating expenses like seed and fertilizer.

products.name: Residential Mortgage Loans
products.description: Fixed-rate, hybrid, and adjustable-rate mortgage products including a Hometown Advantage low-income program.

products.name: Consumer Loans
products.description: Loans for autos, trucks, boats, RVs, motorcycles, and home improvements.

products.name: Checking & Savings Accounts
products.description: Deposit products including checking, savings, certificates of deposit, IRAs, and HSAs.

products.name: Online & Mobile Banking
products.description: Consumer and business digital banking including bill-pay, mobile banking, and ACH/wire origination.

products.name: Remote Deposit Capture
products.description: Electronic deposit processing for business customers.

products.name: FM Investment Services
products.description: Brokerage and investment services offered through Raymond James Financial Services since 1999.

products.name: F&M Insurance Agency, LLC
products.description: Insurance products offered to bank customers, formed November 2023.

products.name: ITMs/ATMs
products.description: Interactive Teller Machines and ATMs at branch and independent locations providing remote teller access.

partnerships.description: Securities offered through Raymond James via FM Investment Services brokerage department.
Secondary market participation for longer-term fixed-rate mortgage loans.
Guaranteed secondary agricultural market lending program participation.
Participation in SBA-type programs to offer small business loan products.

partnerships.partner_name: State of Ohio (Ag-Link, Grow Now, Ohio Homebuyers Plus)
partnerships.description: Three Ohio state programs offering cost-saving products to bank and consumers.
